hypothesis: Cancels profiled at 240 output tokens (>=93.75% of the mock 256-token cap) abort only the streams whose seeded generation exceeds 240 tokens (~1/16 of 200 requests): realized cancels carry output_tokens_at_cancel=240; mock aborts observed phase=mid_stream, chunks_sent>=241, within 100ms of client cancel; all other streams complete ok.
notes: I2 acceptance run (c3): cancellation point 3 (near completion). Correctness evidence, not a benchmark.
